THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPREE, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL ST, #618, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-13-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED 1-13-94, 6PM DEF. CERTIFIES HE IS THE SOLE OCCUPANT. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
